description: Multi-value selection dropdown with chip, delimiter, or checkbox display modes, filtering, grouping, select-all, max selection limit, server-side data provider, and custom item/value templates.

examples.title: Basic multi-select with chips
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="TagDto" TValue="int" @bind-Values="selectedTagIds" Items="@tags" DisplayField="@(t => t.Name)" ValueField="@(t => t.Id)" Label="Tags" Placeholder="Select tags..." />

examples.title: Checkbox mode with select all
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="UserDto" TValue="Guid" @bind-Values="selectedUserIds" Items="@users" DisplayField="@(u => u.FullName)" ValueField="@(u => u.Id)" Mode="MultiSelectMode.CheckBox" ShowSelectAll="true" MaxSelectionCount="5" Label="Assign Users" />

examples.title: Server-side data provider with grouping
examples.code: <TmMultiSelect TItem="ProductDto" TValue="int" @bind-Values="productIds" DataProvider="@productProvider" DisplayField="@(p => p.Name)" ValueField="@(p => p.Id)" GroupField="@(p => p.Category)" AllowFiltering="true" Label="Products" />
